title: carduncellus balearicus
intro: Carduncellus balearicus, also known as the Balearic cardoon thistle, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the Balearic Islands in Spain. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a digestive aid and to treat various gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Carduncellus balearicus can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including stomach ulcers and gastritis.
